items.headline_en: llama.cpp release feed now shows b8955
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for llama.cpp changed and the newest visible tag is b8955. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-28T11:52:43Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
